category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-EU EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against EU CE, IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2, protection-device, and national installation expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与欧盟 CE、IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2、保护装置及国家安装要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與歐盟 CE、IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2、保護裝置及國家安裝要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, connector requirements, protection-device requirements, and destination-country electrical installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、接口要求、保护装置要求及目的国电气安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、接口要求、保護裝置要求及目的國電氣安裝規則。

answer_first.en: IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connector compatibility, RCD or RDC-DD protection, and national installation rules are the major EU gaps compared with Chinese GB/T EV-charger compliance.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国 GB/T 充电桩合规，IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2 接口兼容、RCD 或 RDC-DD 保护以及成员国安装规则，是进入欧盟的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國 GB/T 充電樁合規，IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2 接口相容、RCD 或 RDC-DD 保護以及成員國安裝規則，是進入歐盟的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does a China-made EV charger need CE marking to enter the EU?
q.zh: 中国制造的电动汽车充电桩进入欧盟是否需要CE标志？
q.zht: 中國製造的電動汽車充電樁進入歐盟是否需要CE標誌？

a.en: Yes. CE marking under the Low Voltage Directive and EMC Directive is mandatory. Compliance with IEC 61851-1 and IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 connector) provides presumption of conformity for the relevant essential requirements.
a.zh: 是的。《低压指令》和《EMC指令》下的CE标志是强制要求。符合IEC 61851-1（通用要求）和IEC 62196-2（Type 2接口）可推定满足相关基本要求。
a.zht: 是的。《低壓指令》和《EMC指令》下的CE標誌是強制要求。符合IEC 61851-1（通用要求）和IEC 62196-2（Type 2接口）可推定滿足相關基本要求。

q.en: Are Chinese GB/T 20234 connectors compatible with EU Type 2 requirements?
q.zh: 中国GB/T 20234充电接口与欧盟Type 2要求是否兼容？
q.zht: 中國GB/T 20234充電接口與歐盟Type 2要求是否相容？

a.en: No. China's GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with the EU's IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) AC connector and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 DC connector. Hardware redesign to incorporate EU-compatible connectors is required before a Chinese EV charger can be sold in Europe.
a.zh: 不兼容。中国GB/T 20234充电接口与欧盟IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）交流接口及IEC 62196-3 CCS2直流接口在物理上不兼容。中国充电桩在欧洲销售前须进行硬件重新设计，配备欧盟兼容接口。
a.zht: 不相容。中國GB/T 20234充電接口與歐盟IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）交流接口及IEC 62196-3 CCS2直流接口在物理上不相容。中國充電樁在歐洲銷售前須進行硬體重新設計，配備歐盟相容接口。

q.en: What is the biggest compliance gap for a Chinese EV charger entering the EU?
q.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入欧盟最大的合规差距是什么？
q.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入歐盟最大的合規差距是什麼？

a.en: IEC 61851 compliance, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connector hardware replacement (GB/T 20234 is incompatible), RCD or RDC-DD protection requirements, and national installation rules are the major EU gaps compared with Chinese GB/T EV-charger compliance.
a.zh: 相较中国GB/T充电桩合规，IEC 61851合规、IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口硬件替换（GB/T 20234不兼容）、RCD或RDC-DD保护要求以及成员国安装规则，是进入欧盟的主要差距。
a.zht: 相較中國GB/T充電樁合規，IEC 61851合規、IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口硬體替換（GB/T 20234不相容）、RCD或RDC-DD保護要求以及成員國安裝規則，是進入歐盟的主要差距。

q.en: How long does CE certification take for a Chinese EV charger entering the EU?
q.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩取得欧盟CE认证需要多长时间？
q.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁取得歐盟CE認證需要多長時間？

a.en: CE testing to IEC 61851-1 and IEC 62196-2 at an accredited laboratory typically takes 3–6 months. Connector hardware redesign to Type 2/CCS2 is a prerequisite and can add 3–6 months of engineering time before testing begins. Total timeline from a GB/T baseline is commonly 6–12 months.
a.zh: 在认可实验室完成IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196-2的CE测试通常需要3–6个月。Type 2/CCS2接口硬件重新设计是前提条件，测试开始前可能还需3–6个月工程时间。从GB/T基线算起，总时间通常为6–12个月。
a.zht: 在認可實驗室完成IEC 61851-1和IEC 62196-2的CE測試通常需要3–6個月。Type 2/CCS2接口硬體重新設計是前提條件，測試開始前可能還需3–6個月工程時間。從GB/T基線算起，總時間通常為6–12個月。

q.en: Does an EU EV charger need RCD protection and does a Chinese product typically include it?
q.zh: 欧盟充电桩是否需要RCD保护？中国产品通常是否包含此保护？
q.zht: 歐盟充電樁是否需要RCD保護？中國產品通常是否包含此保護？

a.en: Yes. EU installation standards require RCD (residual current device) or RDC-DD (residual direct current detecting device) protection for EV charge points. Chinese GB/T chargers are not typically designed with EU-specific RCD protection circuitry; this is a hardware addition or firmware integration that must be validated under IEC 61851-1 testing.
a.zh: 是的。欧盟安装标准要求电动汽车充电点具备RCD（剩余电流装置）或RDC-DD（剩余直流检测装置）保护。中国GB/T充电桩通常未设计欧盟特定的RCD保护电路；这是一项须在IEC 61851-1测试中进行验证的硬件新增或固件集成。
a.zht: 是的。歐盟安裝標準要求電動汽車充電點具備RCD（剩餘電流裝置）或RDC-DD（剩餘直流偵測裝置）保護。中國GB/T充電樁通常未設計歐盟特定的RCD保護電路；這是一項須在IEC 61851-1測試中進行驗證的硬體新增或韌體整合。

q.en: Does an EV charger sold in the EU need a local representative?
q.zh: 在欧盟销售的电动汽车充电桩是否需要当地代表？
q.zht: 在歐盟銷售的電動汽車充電樁是否需要當地代表？

a.en: Yes. Under EU product safety law, a non-EU manufacturer must appoint an EU Authorised Representative established in an EU member state. This representative holds the technical file, signs the Declaration of Conformity, and is the contact for EU market surveillance authorities. Under the EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR), a responsible person must also be identifiable on the product or packaging.
a.zh: 是的。根据欧盟产品安全法，非欧盟制造商须指定一名在欧盟成员国设立的欧盟授权代表。该代表持有技术文件、签署符合性声明，并作为欧盟市场监督机构的联系方。根据欧盟《通用产品安全法规》（GPSR），产品或包装上还须标识责任人。
a.zht: 是的。根據歐盟產品安全法，非歐盟製造商須指定一名在歐盟成員國設立的歐盟授權代表。該代表持有技術文件、簽署符合性聲明，並作為歐盟市場監督機構的聯絡方。根據歐盟《通用產品安全法規》（GPSR），產品或包裝上還須標識責任人。
